news.title: 2026 Anniversary Celebration Events
news.caption: This May we're celebrating the sixth anniversary of the release of Foundry Virtual Tabletop in 2020. We're very happy to be able to mark this special occasion with special events, behind-the-curtain peeks at our projects, and of course, our anniversary sale. We hope everyone in the community will join us in marking this milestone!

news.title: Version 14 Stable Release
news.caption: Version 14 Stable has now been released! Check out our release notes for everything you need to know.

news.title: Try Out Scene Levels with The Restored Keep
news.caption: You can check out V14's premiere feature Scene Levels with the Restored Keep module. We put this module together to show off how you should use Scene Levels with an excellent demo map courtesy of Tom Cartos!

news.title: Overview Video
news.caption: Watch a comprehensive video overview which summarizes the features of Foundry Virtual Tabletop.

featuredContent.title: Ember Early Access
featuredContent.caption: Ember is an adventure and setting of unprecedented scale made by the creators of Foundry Virtual Tabletop. With innovative systems designed exclusively for Foundry VTT, Ember is an experience unlike anything else you've seen. Ember is available NOW in Early Access!
